# Vendored elkjs

- Package: `elkjs`
- Version: `0.11.1`
- Source: https://github.com/kieler/elkjs
- Registry: https://www.npmjs.com/package/elkjs/v/0.11.1
- License: EPL-2.0; see `LICENSE.md`
- Integrity from npm package: `sha512-zxxR9k+rx5ktM[...]1/U2YraWxyKKg==`

Only the bundled browser runtime, upstream metadata, typings, README, and license are retained. The application loads `lib/elk.bundled.js` locally and does not require network access or `node_modules` at runtime.
